IfcRelAggregates.summary: Decomposition relation connecting semantic parents to aggregated children.
queryPatterns: MATCH (parent)<--(rel:IfcRelAggregates)-->(child) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, parent.Name AS parent_name, child.Name AS child_name LIMIT 24

IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure.summary: Containment relation between products and spatial containers.
queryPatterns: MATCH (container)<--(rel:IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure)-->(element) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, container.Name AS container_name, element.Name AS element_name LIMIT 24
MATCH (instance)<--(rel:IfcRelDefinesByType)-->(type) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, instance.Name AS instance_name, type.Name AS type_name LIMIT 24
cautions: Useful when instance properties are weak.

IfcRelAssociatesMaterial.summary: Material association relation between products and materials or intermediate material-definition nodes.
queryPatterns: MATCH (rel:IfcRelAssociatesMaterial)--(other) RETURN DISTINCT labels(other)[0] AS node_label, count(*) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 24
MATCH (:IfcRelAssociatesMaterial)--(material:IfcMaterial) RETURN DISTINCT material.Name AS material_name LIMIT 24
cautions: Direct IfcMaterial hops may be incomplete.

RELATED_OBJECTS.summary: Role from aggregate, type, property, and material relations toward related product objects.
queryPatterns: MATCH (rel)-[:RELATED_OBJECTS]->(other) RETURN labels(rel)[0] AS relation_label, labels(other)[0] AS other_label, count(*) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 24
cautions: Inspect the relation node label too.
